channel.title: International Journal of Practical Theology
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Journal of Practical Theology

item.title: Boundary Crossing
item.description: Article by Miriam Löhr DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijpt-2024-0054

item.title: The Paradoxical Concept of “Body” as Social Relation: A Cross-Cultural Analysis of Corinth and an Indigenous Community in Lermatang, Maluku, Indonesia
item.description: Article by Miriam Löhr DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijpt-2024-0001

item.title: Koinonia through commensality?
